title: OneMouse
description: OneMouse is a lightweight and powerful "Autoclicker" mod for Minecraft Fabric 1.21. Unlike standard autoclickers that only simulate mouse clicks, OneMouse allows you to automate any key on your keyboard or mouse using simple chat commands.
body:
🖱️ OneMouse
OneMouse is a lightweight and powerful "Autoclicker" mod for Minecraft Fabric 1.21. Unlike standard autoclickers that only simulate mouse clicks, OneMouse allows you to automate any key on your keyboard or mouse using simple chat commands.

Whether you need to spam Left Click for mobs, hold Right Click to eat, or press Space to auto-jump — OneMouse handles it all.

✨ Features
Universal Support: Works with Left/Right/Middle mouse buttons and almost all keyboard keys (W, Space, Enter, Shift, etc.).

Flexible Timing: Set intervals in milliseconds (ms), seconds (s), minutes (m), or even hours (h).

Multi-tasking: Run multiple autclickers at the same time (e.g., auto-attack AND auto-jump).

Easy Commands: No complex GUIs, just simple chat commands.

🚀 How to use
The main command is /onemouse <key> <time>.

Examples:
Auto Attack (Left Click): /onemouse left 600ms (Clicks the left mouse button every 600 milliseconds)

Auto Eat / Place (Right Click): /onemouse right 3s (Clicks the right mouse button every 3 seconds)

Auto Jump (Space): /onemouse space 1s

Auto Walk Forward (W key): /onemouse w 100ms

Stopping Tasks:
Stop a specific key: /onemouse left stop

Stop EVERYTHING: /onemouse stopall

⏳ Time Formats
You can use the following suffixes for time:

ms = Milliseconds (e.g., 100ms)

s = Seconds (e.g., 5s)

m = Minutes (e.g., 2m)

h = Hours (e.g., 1h)
